title: Phaseolaria praetermissa

The Fabaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants that includes over 19,000 species. Within the Fabaceae family, Phaseolaria praetermissa is part of the subfamily Faboideae, which contains many species of beans and peas. The classification of Phaseolaria praetermissa provides important information about its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
